1.gl: properly, to glitter from afar, i.e. to be eminent (as a superintendent, especially of the Temple services and its music); to be permanent
1.kj: excel, chief musician (singer), oversee(-r), set forward.
1.dv: a primitive root;  also as denominative from H5331 (נֶצַח)

1.gl: David, the youngest son of Jesse
1.dv: rarely (fully); דָּוִיד; from the same as H1730 (דּוֹד); loving;

1.gl: properly, instrumental music; by implication, a poem set to notes

2.gl: to separate mentally (or distinguish), i.e.(generally) understand
2.kj: attend, consider, be cunning, diligently, direct, discern, eloquent, feel, inform, instruct, have intelligence, know, look well to, mark, perceive, be prudent, regard, (can) skill(

2.gl: to broaden out the ear (with the hand), i.e. (by implication) to listen
2.kj: give (perceive by the) ear, hear(-ken). See H239 (אָזַן).
2.dv: a primitive root; probably to expand; but used only as a denominative from H241 (אֹזֶן);

2.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
2.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

2.dv: from an unused root akin to H1897 (הָגָה);

2.kj: answer, [idiom] appointed unto him, saying, speech, word.

3.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
3.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.
[phrase] aloud, bleating, crackling, cry ([phrase] out), fame, lightness, lowing, noise, [phrase] hold peace, (pro-) claim, proclamation, [phrase] sing, sound, [phrase] spark, thun
3.dv: or קֹל; from an unused root meaning to call aloud;

3.gl: to judge (officially or mentally); by extension, to intercede, pray
to prick up the ears, i.e. hearken
3.kj: attend, (cause to) hear(-ken), give heed, incline, mark (well), regard.

4.gl: to hear intelligently (often with implication of attention, obedience, etc.; causatively, to tell, etc.)
4.kj: [idiom] attentively, call (gather) together, [idiom] carefully, [idiom] certainly, consent, consider, be content, declare, [idiom] diligently, discern, give ear, (cause to, let, ma

4.gl: to set in a row, i.e. arrange, put in order (in a very wide variety of applications)
4.kj: put (set) (the battle, self) in array, compare, direct, equal, esteem, estimate, expert (in war), furnish, handle, join (battle), ordain, (lay, put, reckon up, set) (in) order, pre
[phrase] aloud, bleating, crackling, cry ([phrase] out), fame, lightness, lowing, noise, [phrase] hold peace, (pro-) claim, proclamation, [phrase] sing, sound, [phrase] spark, thun
4.dv: or קֹל; from an unused root meaning to call aloud;

4.gl: properly, to lean forward, i.e. to peer into the distance; by implication, to observe, await
4.kj: behold, espy, look up (well), wait for, (keep the) watch(-man).

4.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
4.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

4.gl: properly, dawn (as the break of day); generally, morning

5.gl: bad or (as noun) evil (natural or moral)
5.kj: adversity, affliction, bad, calamity, [phrase] displease(-ure), distress, evil((-favouredness), man, thing), [phrase] exceedingly, [idiom] great, grief(-vous), harm, heavy, hurt(-f

5.gl: properly, to turn aside from the road (for a lodging or any other purpose), i.e. sojourn (as a guest); also to shrink, fear (as in a strange place); also to gather forhostility (as afraid)
5.kj: abide, assemble, be afraid, dwell, fear, gather (together), inhabitant, remain, sojourn, stand in awe, (be) stranger, [idiom] surely.

5.gl: thou and thee, or (plural) ye and you
5.dv: or (shortened); אַתָּ; or אַת; feminine (irregular) sometimes אַתִּי; plural masculine אַתֶּם; feminine אַתֶּן; or אַתֵּנָהlemma אתֵּנָה missing vowel

5.gl: strength; as adjective, mighty; especially the Almighty (but used also of any deity)
5.kj: God (god), [idiom] goodly, [idiom] great, idol, might(-y one), power, strong. Compare names in '-el.'
delight in, desire, favour, please, have pleasure, whosoever would, willing, wish.

6.gl: an eye (literally or figuratively); by analogy, a fountain (as the eye of the landscape)
6.kj: affliction, outward appearance, [phrase] before, [phrase] think best, colour, conceit, [phrase] be content, countenance, [phrase] displease, eye((-brow), (-d), -sight), face, [phra

6.gl: to be clear (orig. of sound, but usually of color); to shine; hence, to make ashow, to boast; and thus to be (clamorously) foolish; to rave; causatively, to celebrate; also to stultify
6.kj: (make) boast (self), celebrate, commend, (deal, make), fool(-ish, -ly), glory, give (light), be (make, feign self) mad (against), give in marriage, (sing, be worthy of) praise, rag

6.gl: strictly nothingness; also trouble. vanity, wickedness; specifically an idol
6.kj: affliction, evil, false, idol, iniquity, mischief, mourners(-ing), naught, sorrow, unjust, unrighteous, vain, vanity, wicked(-ness). Compare H369 (אַיִן).
6.dv: from an unused root perhaps meaning properly, to pant (hence, to exert oneself, usually in vain; to come to naught);

6.gl: to place (any thing so as to stay); reflexively, to station, offer, continue
6.kj: present selves, remaining, resort, set (selves), (be able to, can, with-) stand (fast, forth, -ing, still, up).

6.gl: properly, non-occurrence; used adverbially, not yet or before
6.dv: from an unused root apparently meaning to interrupt or suspend;

6.gl: to do or make (systematically and habitually), especially to practise

7.gl: a man as an individual or a male person; often used as an adjunct to a more definite term (and in such cases frequently not expressed in translation)
7.kj: also, another, any (man), a certain, [phrase] champion, consent, each, every (one), fellow, (foot-, husband-) man, (good-, great, mighty) man, he, high (degree), him (that is), hus
7.dv: contracted for H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ) (or perhaps rather from an unused root meaning to be extant);

7.gl: perhaps properly, to arrange; but used figuratively (of words), to speak; rarely (in a destructive sense) to subdue
7.kj: answer, appoint, bid, command, commune, declare, destroy, give, name, promise, pronounce, rehearse, say, speak, be spokesman, subdue, talk, teach, tell, think, use (entreaties), ut

7.gl: properly, to wander away, i.e. lose oneself; by implication to perish (causative, destroy)
7.kj: break, destroy(-uction), [phrase] not escape, fail, lose, (cause to, make) perish, spend, [idiom] and surely, take, be undone, [idiom] utterly, be void of, have no way to flee.

7.gl: blood (as that which when shed causes death) of man or an animal; by analogy, the juice of the grape; figuratively (especially in the plural) bloodshed (i.e. drops of blood)
Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
7.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).
(make to be) abhor(-red), (be, commit more, do) abominable(-y), [idiom] utterly.

8.gl: to go or come (in a wide variety of applications)
8.kj: abide, apply, attain, [idiom] be, befall, [phrase] besiege, bring (forth, in, into, to pass), call, carry, [idiom] certainly, (cause, let, thing for) to come (against, in, out, upo

8.gl: a house (in the greatest variation of applications, especially family, etc.)
8.kj: court, daughter, door, [phrase] dungeon, family, [phrase] forth of, [idiom] great as would contain, hangings, home(born), (winter) house(-hold), inside(-ward), palace, place, [phra
abundance(-antly), all, [idiom] common (sort), excellent, great(-ly, -ness, number), huge, be increased, long, many, more in number, most, much, multitude, plenty(-ifully), [idiom]

8.gl: kindness; by implication (towards God) piety; rarely (by opposition) reproof, or (subject.) beauty
8.kj: favour, good deed(-liness, -ness), kindly, (loving-) kindness, merciful (kindness), mercy, pity, reproach, wicked thing.

8.gl: to depress, i.e. prostrate (especially reflexive, in homage to royalty or God)
8.kj: bow (self) down, crouch, fall down (flat), humbly beseech, do (make) obeisance, do reverence, make to stoop, worship.

8.gl: a sacred place or thing; rarely abstract, sanctity
8.kj: consecrated (thing), dedicated (thing), hallowed (thing), holiness, ([idiom] most) holy ([idiom] day, portion, thing), saint, sanctuary.

9.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
9.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
9.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

9.gl: a road (as trodden); figuratively, a course of life or mode of action, often adverb
9.kj: along, away, because of, [phrase] by, conversation, custom, (east-) ward, journey, manner, passenger, through, toward, (high-) (path-) way(-side), whither(-soever).

9.gl: to be straight or even; figuratively, to be (causatively, to make) right, pleasant, prosperous
9.kj: direct, fit, seem good (meet), [phrase] please (will), be (esteem, go) right (on), bring (look, make, take the) straight (way), be upright(-ly).

9.gl: properly, heed, i.e. purpose; used only adverbially, on account of (as a motive or an aim), teleologically, in order that
9.kj: because of, to the end (intent) that, for (to,... 's sake), [phrase] lest, that, to.

9.gl: rightness (abstractly), subjectively (rectitude), objectively (justice), morally (virtue) or figuratively (prosperity)
Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
9.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

10.gl: the mouth (as the means of blowing), whether literal or figurative (particularly speech); specifically edge, portion or side; adverbially (with preposition) according to
10.kj: accord(-ing as, -ing to), after, appointment, assent, collar, command(-ment), [idiom] eat, edge, end, entry, [phrase] file, hole, [idiom] in, mind, mouth, part, portion, [idiom] (s

10.gl: properly, the nearest part, i.e. the center, whether literal, figurative or adverbial (especially with preposition)
10.kj: [idiom] among, [idiom] before, bowels, [idiom] unto charge, [phrase] eat (up), [idiom] heart, [idiom] him, [idiom] in, inward ([idiom] -ly, part, -s, thought), midst, [phrase] out

10.gl: a non-entity; generally used as a negative particle
10.kj: else, except, fail, (father-) less, be gone, in(-curable), neither, never, no (where), none, nor, (any, thing), not, nothing, to nought, past, un(-searchable), well-nigh, without.
10.dv: as if from a primitive root meaning to be nothing or not exist;

10.gl: the tongue (of man or animals), used literally (as the instrument of licking, eating, or speech), and figuratively (speech, an ingot, a fork of flame, a cove of water)
10.kj: [phrase] babbler, bay, [phrase] evil speaker, language, talker, tongue, wedge.
10.dv: or לָשֹׁן; also (in plural) feminine לְשֹׁנָה; from H3960 (לָשַׁן);

10.gl: to be smooth (figuratively); by implication (as smooth stones were used for lots) to apportion or separate
10.kj: deal, distribute, divide, flatter, give, (have, im-) part(-ner), take away a portion, receive, separate self, (be) smooth(-er).

11.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
11.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

11.gl: to push off; used in a great variety of applications, literally and figuratively (to expel, mislead, strike, inflict, etc.)
11.kj: banish, bring, cast down (out), chase, compel, draw away, drive (away, out, quite), fetch a stroke, force, go away, outcast, thrust away (out), withdraw.
abundance(-antly), all, [idiom] common (sort), excellent, great(-ly, -ness, number), huge, be increased, long, many, more in number, most, much, multitude, plenty(-ifully), [idiom]

11.gl: to be (causatively, make) bitter (or unpleasant); (figuratively) to rebel (or resist; causatively, to provoke)
11.kj: bitter, change, be disobedient, disobey, grievously, provocation, provoke(-ing), (be) rebel (against, -lious).

11.gl: to be guilty; by implication to be punished or perish
11.kj: [idiom] certainly, be(-come, made) desolate, destroy, [idiom] greatly, be(-come, found, hold) guilty, offend (acknowledge offence), trespass.

12.gl: properly, concealed, i.e. the vanishing point; generally, time out of mind (past or future), i.e. (practically) eternity; frequentatively, adverbial (especially with prepositional prefix) always
12.kj: alway(-s), ancient (time), any more, continuance, eternal, (for, (n-)) ever(-lasting, -more, of old), lasting, long (time), (of) old (time), perpetual, at any time, (beginning of t

12.gl: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character
12.dv: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));

12.gl: properly, to creak (or emit a stridulous sound), i.e. to shout (usually for joy)
12.kj: aloud for joy, cry out, be joyful (greatly, make to) rejoice, (cause to) shout (for joy), (cause to) sing (aloud, for joy, out), triumph.

12.gl: probably to brighten up, i.e. (figuratively) be (causatively, make) blithe or gleesome
12.kj: cheer up, be (make) glad, (have, make) joy(-ful), be (make) merry, (cause to, make to) rejoice, [idiom] very.

12.gl: properly, to entwine as ascreen; by implication, to fence in, cover over, (figuratively) protect
12.kj: cover, defence, defend, hedge in, join together, set, shut up.

12.gl: to flee for protection; figuratively, to confide in
